text:
Gashta Bellam (ガシタ＝ベラム, Gashita Beramu) is a professional Hunter Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 158 and a player of the game Greed Island hired by Battera at the same time as Gon and Killua. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 126 

Appearance

Gashta is a tall man with an afro hairstyle. He wears tribal-like clothes and carries a messenger bag with him.

Plot

Greed Island arc

Alongside his brother Zetsk, Gashta takes Tsezguerra's Ren test in order to play Greed Island, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 125 and they both pass. Right after entering the game from the Shiso Tree, he regroups with his brother and thanks him for waiting. After Gashta perceives that they are being watched, Zetsk confirms it and claims that there there are several. Gashta deduces that they are no threat and should be ignored. The brothers then head off together into the game. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 127 

The Bombers mention the Bellam brothers as players they should watch. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 152 Gashta's name is mentioned in Gon's binder, and Goreinu also mentions the brothers as a strong and famous duo who never work with others. During Eta's announcement about the trivia game to win the "Ruler's Blessing" card, the brothers attentively listen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 182 After Gon wins the trivia game, the brothers confront Gon and his team. Gashta comments on how they actually managed to get all of the cards in the game, while his brother Zetsk snickers. Zetsk then tells a man who was working for the brothers that his job is done, ordering him to leave and then challenging the group to a winner-take-all match. Gashta then tells the group that it's a match they can't refuse, but the brothers are handily defeated by Gon and Killua. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 183 

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

After Chairman Netero's death, Gashta is seen with his brother taking part in the first round of the 13th Hunter Chairman Elections. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 320 

Abilities & Powers

Gashta is capable enough to have passed the notoriously difficult Hunter Exam. He is an above-average Greed Island player, praised as a capable individual by Goreinu and considered a troublesome opponent by Genthru despite only recently starting the game. He and his brother were feared by multiple players, although not as much as the Bomber. Gashta seems to be the leader of the two-man team. He is highly perceptive, having succeeded in sensing the presence of onlookers as soon as he joined the game, and making inferences about their species and skill level based on it. Nonetheless, the two were easily defeated by Gon and Killua. 

Nen

Due to being able to access Greed Island, Gashta is capable of utilizing Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 and it can be assumed that he is moderately skilled at it since he was approved by Tsezguerra. 

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

It is unknown why Gashta and his brother did not use "Accompany" on Gon directly, since they had already met him at the very start of the game.
